text:
Care Choices (KCC) Model - This model helps health care providers reduce the cost and improve the quality of care for patients with late-stage chronic kidney disease and ESRD and aims to delay the need for dialysis and encourage kidney transplantation.
Making Care Primary (MCP) Model - This model is a multi-payer model with three participation tracks that build upon previous primary care models. MCP aims to improve care for beneficiaries by supporting the delivery of advanced primary care
